title: digitaria cruciata
intro: Digitaria cruciata, also known as Cross Finger Grass or Finger Grass, is a perennial grass native to various parts of the world, particularly in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Digitaria cruciata include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to help lower blood sugar levels and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Digitaria cruciata is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
